tweet_text: 🚨 Everton are considering legal action against the Premier League over the lack of sanctions against Chelsea for rule breaches, despite penalties faced by other clubs. ⚖️ #EFC #ChelseaFC
article_title: Everton exploring legal options over lack of sporting sanctions against Chelsea
